text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! Trainer! I think I might have a hidden
talent! You see, a reporter just asked me a
question.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
They asked me if I was going to put the pedal to
the metal this race, so I said...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
"I'm not a racecar driver, silly! I'm gonna win with
my own two legs!"

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
And then everyone stood up and clapped! I'm
glad they liked that because I don't even have a
driver's license!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
All I have to do now is win! First place, here I
come!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In any case, the event seems to have put Haru
Urara in high spirits.
